case_title: THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D. vs. ALBERT, HERBERT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D. AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERT, HERBERT DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
